# Xtenzium

> Xtenzium is a full-service digital agency and software house based in Karachi, Pakistan. We architect long-term digital success for businesses globally.

## What We Do

Xtenzium delivers end-to-end digital solutions across six practice areas:

- **Web Development**: Custom React, Next.js, and Node.js applications. Full-stack development, REST APIs, eCommerce platforms, SaaS products, and performance-optimized web apps.
- **UI/UX Design**: User interface design, UX research, design systems, branding, and Figma prototyping. We design for conversion and long-term brand equity.
- **AI & Automation**: LLM integrations, workflow automation, AI-powered tools, chatbots, RAG systems, and intelligent business process automation.
- **IoT & Embedded Systems**: Custom PCB design, embedded firmware development, IoT sensor networks, MQTT integrations, smart home automation, and industrial IoT. This is Xtenzium's core differentiator — very few agencies bridge software and custom hardware.
- **Cybersecurity**: Web application security audits, penetration testing, OWASP compliance, authentication hardening, and data protection.
- **Digital Marketing**: SEO, content marketing, paid advertising, social media strategy, and analytics.
- **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, GCP, Vercel deployments, Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud cost optimization.
- **Consultancy**: Digital transformation strategy, AI consultancy, and market research.

## Key Facts

- Location: Karachi, Pakistan
- Contact: contact@xtenzium.com
- Website: https://www.xtenzium.com
- Projects delivered: 65+
- Average client ROI: 36%+
- Team: CEO, COO, CMO, Electronics Lead
- Primary markets: Global (North America, Europe, Middle East, South Asia)

## Core Differentiator

Most digital agencies are software-only. Xtenzium bridges software AND custom hardware — PCB design, IoT device engineering, and embedded systems — under one roof. A client building a smart connected product gets app, firmware, cloud backend, and hardware design from a single team.

## Services Summary

| Service | What We Deliver |
|---|---|
| Web Development | React, Next.js, Node.js, REST APIs, SaaS, eCommerce |
| UI/UX Design | Design systems, Figma, branding, user research |
| AI & Automation | LLM integrations, RAG, workflow bots, AI tools |
| IoT & Electronics | PCB design, embedded firmware, MQTT, smart devices |
| Cybersecurity | Security audits, pen testing, OWASP compliance |
| Digital Marketing | SEO, content strategy, paid ads, analytics |
| Cloud & DevOps | AWS, GCP, Vercel, Docker, CI/CD |
| Consultancy | Digital transformation, AI strategy, market research |

## Who We Work With

- Startups building their first digital product
- Scale-ups modernizing legacy systems
- Enterprises adding IoT or AI capabilities
- Businesses across Pakistan, Middle East, North America, and Europe

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is Xtenzium a software house or a digital agency?**
A: Both. Xtenzium is a full-service digital agency and software house in Karachi, Pakistan. What makes us unique is that we also build custom hardware: PCB design, IoT devices, and embedded systems firmware.

**Q: Does Xtenzium work with international clients?**
A: Yes. While headquartered in Karachi, Pakistan, we serve clients globally — primarily in North America, Europe, and the Middle East.

**Q: What technologies does Xtenzium use for web development?**
A: Our primary web stack is React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Node.js on the backend. We also work with PostgreSQL, Supabase, AWS, and Vercel for deployment.

**Q: Can Xtenzium handle both the app and the hardware for an IoT product?**
A: Yes — this is exactly what we do. We handle PCB design, embedded firmware, cloud backend, mobile app, and dashboard in a single engagement.

**Q: How do I contact Xtenzium?**
A: Email contact@xtenzium.com or use the contact form at https://www.xtenzium.com/contact

## Tagline

"We Architect Long-Term Success."
